title: Odoo module: AI Meeting Assistant
shortDescription: Custom Odoo module integrating AI to transform meeting recordings into transcripts, summaries, and actionable tasks.
description: Developed a full-stack AI Meeting Assistant integrated into Odoo as a custom business module. The solution allows users to upload meeting recordings directly from the ERP, automatically transcribe audio using Whisper-based speech recognition, generate concise summaries, and extract action items through Large Language Models such as Ollama. REST API integration with a FastAPI backend, and a dedicated Odoo user interface. Integration of AI-powered automation into enterprise software.
